title: Hiro's Animal School Friends
synopsis: Hiro starts his first day at a special school where animal friends help him learn and play. He meets a wise owl teacher and makes friends with various classroom animals who teach him about numbers, letters, and friendship.

pages.text: Hiro walked into his new classroom with big eyes full of wonder. This wasn't just any school - it was a special place where animals were the teachers and helpers! A friendly owl with big round glasses sat at the teacher's desk.

illustration.description: A classroom scene drawn in chalkboard style on a dark green board with white and colored chalk. Hiro, a boy with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face, stands at the classroom doorway looking excited. A wise owl wearing glasses sits at a teacher's desk. Simple equations and alphabet letters are doodled in the background. The scene has a warm, dusty chalk texture with hand-drawn details.
illustration.alt: Hiro entering a classroom with an owl teacher at the desk

pages.text: "Welcome, Hiro!" hooted Mrs. Owl gently. "Today you'll meet all our animal friends who help us learn." A fluffy bunny hopped over with crayons in her paws. "I'm Bella Bunny! I help with art time," she said with a wiggle of her pink nose.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board showing Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face standing next to a fluffy white bunny holding colorful crayons. Mrs. Owl is in the background. White and colored chalk create warm, dusty textures with doodled flowers and art supplies around the edges.
illustration.alt: Hiro meeting Bella Bunny who holds art crayons

pages.text: Next, a cheerful bear waved from the reading corner. "I'm Benny Bear, and I love story time!" he called out. Behind him sat shelves full of colorful picture books. Hiro clapped his hands with joy - he loved books too!

illustration.description: Hand-drawn chalk illustration on dark green board showing Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face clapping happily near a friendly brown bear sitting by bookshelves. The scene includes white and colored chalk details of books, reading corner cushions, and simple school doodles in the background with warm, dusty chalk texture.
illustration.alt: Hiro and Benny Bear in the reading corner with books

pages.text: At the math table, Charlie Cat was counting colorful blocks. "One, two, three!" purred Charlie. "Want to count with me, Hiro?" Hiro nodded and carefully stacked the red blocks while Charlie helped him count each one.

illustration.description: Chalkboard style drawing on dark green board with white and colored chalk showing Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face sitting at a table with an orange tabby cat. They're counting colorful building blocks together. Simple math equations and numbers are doodled around the scene with warm, dusty chalk texture and hand-drawn school elements.
illustration.alt: Hiro and Charlie Cat counting blocks at the math table

pages.text: When snack time came, Penny Pig showed Hiro how to wash his hands properly. "Scrub, scrub, scrub!" she oinked happily. Then they sat together and shared apple slices and crackers with all their new animal friends.

illustration.description: Chalk drawing on dark green board showing Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face washing hands at a sink next to a friendly pink pig. White and colored chalk create the scene with soap bubbles, a snack table with apples and crackers in the background, and school-themed doodles with warm, dusty texture.
illustration.alt: Hiro washing hands with Penny Pig before snack time

pages.text: As the school day ended, Hiro hugged each of his new animal friends goodbye. "Thank you for teaching me so much!" he said. Mrs. Owl smiled warmly. "We can't wait to learn and play with you again tomorrow, Hiro!"

illustration.description: Final chalkboard style scene on dark green board with Hiro with short straight black hair, light skin, bright dark brown eyes, round face surrounded by all his animal friends - the owl teacher, bunny, bear, cat, and pig - in a group hug. White and colored chalk create a warm farewell scene with hearts, stars, and simple school doodles around the edges, all with dusty chalk texture and hand-drawn details.
illustration.alt: Hiro saying goodbye to all his animal school friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: chalkboard style, chalk drawings, dark green board, white and colored chalk, equations doodles, school themed, artistic warm, dusty texture, hand-drawn on board

questions.question: Who was Hiro's teacher at the animal school?
questions.explanation: Mrs. Owl was the wise teacher who welcomed Hiro to the classroom and wore glasses.

questions.question: What did Bella Bunny help with at school?
questions.explanation: Bella Bunny helped with art time and brought crayons to share with Hiro.

questions.question: What did Hiro and Charlie Cat do together?
questions.explanation: Hiro and Charlie Cat counted colorful blocks together at the math table.

questions.question: How did Hiro feel about his new animal school friends?
questions.explanation: Hiro was happy and excited to meet his animal friends and thanked them for teaching him so much.
